page_title: Application for Permanent Residence: Temporary Resident Permit Holder - Canada.ca
h1: Application for Permanent Residence: Temporary Resident Permit Holder

h3: You must fill out these digital forms online
You must also fill out these PDF forms

sections.heading: How to apply online
items: Sign in or create a Permanent residence online application portal account (opens in a new tab) .
Refer to the Instruction Guide [IMM 5527] for important information about your eligibility, fees and how to apply.

sections.heading: You need to apply online
items: As of October 14, 2022, it is now mandatory to apply online.
If you can’t apply online, and require accommodations, including for a disability, you can ask for the application in another format (paper, braille or large print).

sections.heading: You must fill out these digital forms online
items: You’ll fill out these digital forms online (for yourself, and any family members 18 or older)
bullets: Generic Application Form for Canada (IMM 0008) (opens in a new tab)
Schedule A – Background/Declaration (IMM 5669) (opens in a new tab)
Additional Family Information (IMM 5406) (opens in a new tab)

sections.heading: You must also fill out these PDF forms
Using an immigration representative
items: If you want to appoint someone to do business with us on your behalf, you must
An immigration representative (an immigration consultant or lawyer) can give you advice and help you with your application for a fee. But they can’t
A representative can fill out forms and communicate with us on your behalf through their own account. They can also
After you read the declaration, you must be the one who types your name . This is the legal requirement for your application to be considered “signed,” according to Canada’s immigration law.
If you want to allow us to release information from your application to someone other than yourself who will not act as your representative you must
bullets: submit a Use of a Representative [IMM 5476] (opens in a new tab) form
sign it digitally or by hand and get your immigration representative to do so also
upload it with your application
open a portal account on your behalf
electronically sign the application for you
sign into the portal using your username and password
help you prepare the documents you need to upload
answer questions about the forms
submit an Authority to Release Personal Information to a Designated Individual [IMM 5475] (opens in a new tab) form
complete the form and sign it (digitally or by hand)
get your designated individual to sign it as well

sections.heading: Photo specifications
items: You need one photo for each person on your application.
Follow the instructions in the online application to scan and upload both sides of your photo.

sections.heading: Technical issues
items: If you’re having technical issues applying, contact us using the web form
If you need to upload a number of images, find out how to combine them into 1 document .
bullets: under type of application/enquiry , choose technical difficulties from the drop-down menu
in the text box, specify the program you’re applying under
upload screenshots from your account that show us the page where you’re having problems the error message(s) you get
the page where you’re having problems
the error message(s) you get

sections.heading: Pay your fees online
items: Find out how to pay your fees .

sections.heading: Submit your online application
items: Before you submit your application, make sure you:
If your application is incomplete, we’ll reject it. You’ll have to fix any errors and then re-submit it.
bullets: answer all questions
electronically sign your application (type your full name exactly as shown on your passport)
include your processing fee receipt
upload all the supporting documents
